mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, causing equity risk premiums to rise and S&P 500 forward returns to turn negative.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in > 55% of triggered instances over out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and economic momentum, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in > 60% of cases during backtesting.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 50% of high-inflation observations across rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and economic activity, generating positive short-term momentum in S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) across rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in total nonfarm payrolls indicate labor market contraction and weakening economic fundamentals, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns dominate in > 55% of consecutive decline periods over out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth combined with stable inflation signals a healthy economic expansion without overheating, supporting corporate profitability and positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform baseline returns over 3-year out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production during a supply chain disruption regime indicates severe output bottlenecks and margin compression, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Negative signal instances produce positive forward returns in > 50% of cases during identified disruption periods.
